name: Thalassa Voulgaris
summary: Accomplished Senior Security Engineer with over 8 years of experience in cloud infrastructure protection and incident response. Proven track record in architecting zero-trust environments and leading cross-functional teams to mitigate complex cyber threats in high-scale enterprise systems.

experience.title: Senior Security Engineer
experience.description: Lead the security architecture for multi-cloud environments, implementing automated threat detection and response workflows. Reduced incident resolution time by 40% through the deployment of custom SIEM integrations.

experience.title: Security Engineer
experience.description: Managed vulnerability assessment programs and conducted regular penetration testing for core banking applications. Oversaw compliance audits for GDPR and ISO 27001 standards.

experience.title: Junior Information Security Analyst
experience.description: Monitored network traffic for anomalies and assisted in the configuration of firewalls and intrusion detection systems. Provided technical support for internal security policy enforcement.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
